name: suppressed_section_enforcement
description: Acceptance fixture #8. When evidence_conclusions.suppressed_sections includes 'executive_summary', the claim-aware battle card renderer must not persist a live executive_summary block, even if a valid pain_claim_about_vendor exists for the vendor. The pain claim itself still validates; the suppression check is enforced downstream of validate_claim, in the report renderer. The fixture asserts both halves: claim is valid AND rendered battle card has no executive_summary.

review.summary: Pricing model is hard to predict
review.review_text: The seat-based pricing keeps surprising us at renewal because of the agent count drift. We will probably stay because the migration cost is too high but it is a constant friction.

witness.excerpt_text: seat-based pricing keeps surprising us at renewal
